title: selaginella kochii
intro: Selaginella kochii, also known as Spikemoss or Spike Moss, is a type of small, terrestrial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Selaginella kochii include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and potential relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
